changelog:
What's New in v1.0.0

This is a major milestone release — **Homelab 1.0** is here!

New Services
- **Servarr Stack** — Full dashboard for the complete media automation suite:
- Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr (arr apps with downloads, health, upcoming)
- qBittorrent (speeds, DHT nodes, Gluetun tunnel/firewall status)
- Bazarr (subtitle manager — missing subtitles, download status)
- FlareSolverr (Cloudflare bypass proxy — status and version)
- Jellyseerr (requests and pending approvals)
- **Technitium DNS** — DNS statistics and query monitoring
- **Pangolin / Newt** — VPN tunnel dashboard
- **Dockhand** — Container manager dashboard
- **Linux Update** — System update status across your hosts

Design & Customization
- **Home redesign** — Refreshed colors, icons, and card layout
- **Alternate app icons** — 6 variants: Default, Dark, Clear Light, Clear Dark, Tinted Light, Tinted Dark
- **New color theme options** in Settings

Other Improvements
- Various bug fixes and performance improvements

---

> **A small note:** I'm taking a short break from development to focus on my studies. Thank you for all the support — it means a lot! Development will resume soon. 🙏

---

Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+
